title: Alexanarch External-Metadata Sidecar
description: Per-deposit external-metadata sidecar. One file per deposit at /data/external-metadata/AXN-NNNN.json. Holds recovered metadata for the deposit's legacy Zenodo DOIs, harvested from OpenAlex, the Zenodo monthly bulk export, DataCite, and the multi-heteronym DataCite survivor sweep. Sidecars are pointed at by registry.deposits[*].external_metadata_path and may be added, replaced, or removed without altering the deposit's canonical bytes (AXN hash).

axn.description: Canonical AXN v2 of the deposit this sidecar belongs to. Must match registry.deposits[*].axn.

zenodo_dois_covered.description: All legacy Zenodo DOIs covered by this sidecar. Mirrors registry.deposits[*].zenodo_dois.

severance_status.description: Net severance status across all covered DOIs. severed = scrubbed from DataCite REST; anonymized = creator metadata replaced with institutional name; retained = still surfaces under heteronym/ORCID search; post_window = minted after 2026-06-07 bulk-export snapshot; typo_immunity = escaped severance because creator name has a typo; mixed = different status per DOI.

sources.description: Sources from which metadata was recovered. Any subset present; all four absent is allowed for native-Alexanarch deposits.

records.description: OpenAlex Work records, one per Zenodo DOI covered. abstract_inverted_index is decoded to plain text in the 'abstract' field.

tarball_path.description: Path of the .tar.gz inside the repo containing the XML.

entries.description: Per-DOI XML filenames inside the tarball.

records.description: DataCite REST records for the covered DOIs at 2026-06-22 (pre-termination).
